allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./data/overrides.json'\); const ev = d.events['campaign-daily-1776389435279']; console.log\(JSON.stringify\({meta: ev.meta, results_keys: Object.keys\(ev.results || {}\), participants_count: \(ev.participants||[]\).length}, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/overrides.json'\); const keys=Object.keys\(d.events||{}\); console.log\('Event keys:', keys.slice\(0,30\)\); const settings=d.settings?.campaigns; console.log\('Campaign types:', Object.keys\(settings||{}\)\); const semanal=\(settings?.semanal||settings?.weekly||[]\); console.log\('Semanal campaigns:', JSON.stringify\(semanal.map\(c=>\({id:c.id,name:c.name,hasFinalStage:c.hasFinalStage,finalDays:c.finalDays,format:c.format}\)\),null,2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/overrides.json'\); const ev=d.events['campaign-weekly-1776461959761-2026-04-13']; console.log\('Weekly event sample:', JSON.stringify\({id:'campaign-weekly-1776461959761-2026-04-13', meta:ev?.meta, participants:\(ev?.participants||[]\).length, hasResults:Object.keys\(ev?.results||{}\).length}, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {loadJornada, saveJornadaServer, listJornadaDates} = require\('./storage'\); console.log\('exports OK', typeof loadJornada, typeof saveJornadaServer, typeof listJornadaDates\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cw=d.get\('campaigns',{}\).get\('semanal',[]\); [print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in c.items\(\) if k in ['id','name','format','competitionMode','hasFinalStage','finalDays','modeConfig','qualifiersCount','qualifiersPerGroup']}, indent=2\)\) for c in cw]")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const raw=fs.readFileSync\('./data/overrides.json','utf8'\); const d=JSON.parse\(raw\); console.log\('campaigns keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\); if\(d.campaigns\) console.log\('campaign types:', Object.keys\(d.campaigns\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const raw=fs.readFileSync\('./data/overrides.json','utf8'\); const d=JSON.parse\(raw\); const s=d?.settings; console.log\('settings keys:', Object.keys\(s||{}\)\); const cw=s?.campaigns?.semanal||[]; console.log\('semanal campaigns:', cw.length\); cw.forEach\(c=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\({id:c.id,name:c.name,format:c.format,competitionMode:c.competitionMode,hasFinalStage:c.hasFinalStage,finalDays:c.finalDays,modeConfig:c.modeConfig},null,2\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const raw=fs.readFileSync\('./data/overrides.json','utf8'\); const d=JSON.parse\(raw\); const s=d?.settings; const cw=s?.campaigns; console.log\('campaign keys:', Object.keys\(cw||{}\)\); Object.entries\(cw||{}\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>{ if\(Array.isArray\(v\)\) v.forEach\(c=>console.log\(k,c.id,c.name,JSON.stringify\({format:c.format,competitionMode:c.competitionMode,hasFinalStage:c.hasFinalStage,finalDays:c.finalDays?.slice\(0,2\),modeConfig:c.modeConfig}\)\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const raw=fs.readFileSync\('./data/overrides.json','utf8'\); const d=JSON.parse\(raw\); const evts=d?.events||{}; const keys=Object.keys\(evts\).filter\(k=>evts[k]?.participants?.length>0\); console.log\('events with participants:',keys.length\); keys.forEach\(k=>{const ev=evts[k]; const date=ev?.meta?.date||ev?.date||k; const n=ev.participants?.length; console.log\(k, date, n,'participants', ev.campaignType||'no-type'\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const raw=fs.readFileSync\('./data/overrides.json','utf8'\); const d=JSON.parse\(raw\); const reg=d?.registry||[]; console.log\('registry count:', reg.length\); reg.slice\(0,10\).forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.name, 'semanal:', r.semanal\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const raw=fs.readFileSync\('./data/overrides.json','utf8'\); const d=JSON.parse\(raw\); const ev=d?.events||{}; const finalEv=ev['campaign-weekly-1776461959761-2026-04-18']; console.log\('final event participants:'\); \(finalEv?.participants||[]\).forEach\(p=>console.log\(p.name||p.index\)\); const classEv=ev['campaign-weekly-1776461959761-2026-04-13']; console.log\('classification event sample:'\); \(classEv?.participants||[]\).slice\(0,5\).forEach\(p=>console.log\(p.name||p.index\)\)")
